description.en: A master of disguise that looks exactly like a beautiful orchid flower to lure unsuspecting prey.
description.zh: 伪装大师，看起来就像一朵美丽的兰花，以此引诱毫无防备的猎物。

anatomy.en: Their legs are shaped like flower petals! Females are much larger than males and feature stunning pink and white coloration. They can even change their color over a few days depending on background light and humidity.
anatomy.zh: 它们的腿长得就像花瓣一样！雌性远大于雄性，呈现出令人惊叹的粉色和白色。它们甚至可以根据背景光线和湿度，在几天的时间内改变自己的颜色。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Orchid mantises use 'aggressive mimicry'. Instead of hiding to avoid predators, they sit perfectly still on leaves. Deceived butterflies and bees fly right up to them thinking they are a flower, only to be snapped up!
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 兰花螳螂使用「攻击性拟态」。它们不需要为了躲避天敌而躲藏在暗处，而是直挺挺地坐在叶子上。被欺骗的蝴蝶和蜜蜂以为它们是花朵直接飞过来，结果瞬间被捕食！

habitat_and_distribution.en: They inhabit the lush tropical rainforests of Southeast Asia, thriving in the warm, humid environments of countries like Malaysia and Indonesia.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们栖息在东南亚茂密的热带雨林中，在马来西亚和印度尼西亚等国家温暖湿润的环境中繁衍生息。
